completed_steps.summary: Documentation requirements loaded for web + backend project types. Previous state archived.
Classified as monorepo with 2 parts: frontend (web / Nuxt 4) + backend (backend / FastAPI).
Inventoried existing docs (README, CLAUDE, Makefile, .env.example, specs/001-018, prior docs/ files — preserved technical-debt-backlog.md).

Tech stacks deep-scanned via 3 parallel Explore agents: frontend Nuxt 4.4 + Vue 3 + Pinia 3 + Tailwind 4 + driver.js 1.4 + GSAP + Chart.js/Mermaid + Vitest 3 + Playwright 1.49; backend FastAPI 0.115 + SQLAlchemy 2 async + asyncpg + pgvector 0.3.6 + LangGraph 0.2 + LangChain 0.3 + OpenRouter Claude Sonnet 4 + WeasyPrint + PyMuPDF + pytesseract; infra Docker Compose + nginx UAfricas.

Deep analysis: 73 REST endpoints on 13 routers, 22 SQLAlchemy models in 14 files (incl. new InteractiveQuestion + ToolCallLog), 13 Alembic migrations, 9 LangGraph nodes with active_module multi-turn routing (spec 013), 12 tool files with ~36 LangChain tools (incl. ask_interactive_question spec 018 + trigger_guided_tour spec 019 + batch_save_esg_criteria spec 015 + create_fund_application spec 015), 11 prompt modules with STYLE/WIDGET/GUIDED_TOUR helpers, 17 frontend pages, 60 components (incl. 5 copilot/ widget spec 019 + 5 interactive chat widgets spec 018 + 8 richblocks + GuidedTourPopover), 18 composables with 3 module-level state (useChat + useAuth + useGuidedTour), 11 Pinia stores, 12 type files, 6 guided tours with 14 data-guide-target markers.
source-tree-analysis.md rewritten with full annotated monorepo tree (frontend + backend + root + docs).
development-guide.md + deployment-guide.md rewritten from Makefile/docker-compose/deploy.sh/nginx template.

integration-architecture.md written: REST JWT flow, SSE fetch-streaming contract with 10+ event types, multipart upload, active_module multi-turn routing (spec 013), current_page injection (spec 3), guided tours lifecycle (spec 019), interactive widgets (spec 018), observability via tool_call_logs.
architecture-frontend.md + architecture-backend.md rewritten per part with detailed sections (stack, patterns, dark mode, tours, widgets, tests, deployment, ADRs).

Supporting docs written/updated: project-overview.md (mission + stack + journal 001-019), data-models-backend.md (22 models + 13 migrations), api-contracts-backend.md (73 endpoints + SSE), component-inventory-frontend.md (60 components + 18 composables + 11 stores + types + tours registry), project-parts.json metadata.
Master index.md generated with multi-part navigation, quick reference tables, integration map, key entry points for IDE, no incomplete markers.
Validation: 0 `_(To be generated)_` markers, 13 generated files + 1 preserved (technical-debt-backlog.md), all sizes reasonable (4.6KB to 23KB).

findings.frontend_summary: SPA/SSR Nuxt 4.4 + Vue 3 Composition API + Pinia 3 + TailwindCSS 4 + driver.js + GSAP + Chart.js/Mermaid. 17 pages, 60 composants (widget chat flottant spec 019, 5 widgets interactifs spec 018, 8 richblocks, popover tour guidé), 18 composables dont 3 à state module-level (useChat, useAuth, useGuidedTour), 11 stores Pinia. Dark mode obligatoire via @theme. Tests: Vitest unit + Playwright E2E (mockés, Fatou/Moussa) + bash E2E live (Aminata).
findings.backend_summary: FastAPI 0.115 async + SQLAlchemy 2 async + asyncpg + PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector. 73 endpoints REST sur 13 routers, 22 modèles ORM, 13 migrations Alembic. Graphe LangGraph 9 nœuds avec active_module multi-turn routing (spec 013), ~36 tools LangChain dans 12 fichiers (incl. ask_interactive_question spec 018, trigger_guided_tour spec 019, batch_save_esg_criteria + create_fund_application spec 015). 11 modules prompts avec STYLE/WIDGET/GUIDED_TOUR helpers. JWT HS256 + refresh single-flight (spec 7-2). Observabilité via tool_call_logs.
findings.integration_summary: REST JSON + SSE streaming (POST /api/chat/.../messages avec 10+ types d'events : token, tool_call_*, interactive_question*, guided_tour, profile_*, done, error) + multipart upload. Auth JWT HS256 Bearer + refresh single-flight. CORS codé en dur localhost:3000. Pas de rate limiting. Tours guidés via marker SSE consenti par widget QCU yes/no.
major_changes_since_2026_04_12: Chat refactored from standalone page to floating widget (spec 019) — pages/chat.vue removed, chat-redirect.global.ts middleware added
Guided tour system added (specs 4-7) — driver.js lazy-loaded, 6 tours, 14 data-guide-target markers, popover Vue custom, machine à états useGuidedTour, countdown adaptatif, multi-tab sync
Interactive widgets in chat (spec 018) — table interactive_questions, 4 variantes qcu/qcm/*justification, InteractiveQuestionHost + 4 composants, invariant 1 question pending/conversation
Tool calling LangGraph migration (spec 012) — 36 tools LangChain, ToolNode boucle max 5 iter, table tool_call_logs
Active module routing (spec 013) — ConversationState.active_module + active_module_data, router binary classification continuation/changement, défaut sécuritaire
Concise chat style (spec 014) — STYLE_INSTRUCTION injectée conditionnellement
Tool-calling fixes (spec 015) — create_fund_application + batch_save_esg_criteria, request_timeout=60s, prompts durcis
JWT renewal transparent (spec 7-2) — single-flight refreshPromise, SessionExpiredError, cancel tour on session expiry
Page context injection (spec 3) — uiStore.currentPage → FormData → ConversationState.current_page → prompts spécialistes

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To re-run documentation or deep-dive a specific area, invoke bmad-document-project again.
